description: Unique assay identifier combining GeneLab dataset accession and MD5 hash of metadata (links assay to dataset and ensures version integrity)

Log2-transformed fold change in gene expression between the experimental condition and its reference baseline. Positive values indicate up-regulation (higher transcript abundance), while negative values denote down-regulation (lower transcript abundance) relative to the control.

Multiple testing-corrected p-value assessing the statistical significance of each gene's differential expression after controlling the false-discovery rate (FDR). Smaller values (e.g., <= 0.05) indicate that the observed log2 fold change is unlikely to arise by chance, even after accounting for the large number of simultaneous tests performed in the experiment.
Group mean for first sample group
Group stdev for first sample group
Group mean for second sample group
Group stdev for second sample group
